title: AI Research & Strategy Signoff Console
corePromise: Know when AI work is actually done.

steps.name: Create
steps.title: Set the brief
steps.desc: Define the assignment, success criteria, prohibited claims, reviewer authority, and delivery date.

steps.name: Submit
steps.title: Submit the work
steps.desc: Attach the report, files, links, screenshots, tests, citations, traces, and supporting evidence.

steps.name: Check
steps.title: Check the evidence
steps.desc: Surface missing artifacts, weak citations, freshness issues, uncertainty, risk disclosures, and claim-to-evidence gaps.

steps.name: Review
steps.title: Approve or request changes
steps.desc: Give the client one simple review link and three possible outcomes: accepted, needs changes, or rejected.

steps.name: Receipt
steps.title: Issue Mission Receipt
steps.desc: Generate a tamper-evident record of the brief, deliverables, evidence, checks, reviewer decision, timestamps, and unresolved limitations.

tiers.name: Signoff Basic
tiers.customer: No wallet SaaS signoff. Create brief, collect evidence, review, receipt.
tiers.protocol: Protocol-compatible docket and receipt hashes; no public chain action.

tiers.name: Signoff Verified
tiers.customer: Verified receipt with anchored hashes and public verification page.
tiers.protocol: Brief/evidence/receipt commitments anchored after customer authorization.
tiers.agialpha: Sponsored protocol fee only if enabled.

tiers.name: Signoff Secured
tiers.customer: Independent reviewer, challenge window, reputation and credential history.
tiers.protocol: Reviewer/evaluator bonds, attestations, challenges, and slashing readiness after audit.

tiers.name: Signoff & Settle
tiers.customer: Bounded proof-to-payment: accepted work releases reward; disputes pause settlement.
tiers.protocol: Job escrow, reward vault, dispute/appeal rails, treasury routing after user-fund authorization.
tiers.agialpha: Settlement, rewards, challenge stake, and protocol revenue when authorized.
